reviews.comment:
Solamente cargamos nafta y cobran la ficha para cargar aire peroooo ese no es el problema, sino que mi marido no pudo evitar cortarse la mano al usar el calibrador. Tiene roto el recubrimiento de goma y expuesto los alambres. Más les vale que no se agarre nada.

(Translated by Google)
We only filled up with gas, and they charge a token to fill up with air, but that's not the problem. The real issue is that my husband cut his hand using the gauge. The rubber coating is broken, exposing the wires. They'd better make sure nothing gets caught on it.
